title: Facebook Lead Ads Trigger not receiving data
symptom: The Facebook Lead Ads Trigger node is not receiving any data when testing the workflow. Users may see no events being triggered despite correct setup.
applies_when: Using Facebook Lead Ads Trigger node
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly set for both testing and production
root_cause: Facebook Lead Ads only allows one webhook URL per app. Switching between testing and production URLs overwrites the registered webhook, causing the trigger to not receive data if the wrong URL is active.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the correct webhook URL for the current mode (test or production)
Disable the workflow before switching URLs to avoid overwriting
Test the trigger again after confirming the correct URL is set
agent_instruction: Verify and use the correct webhook URL for your current testing or production mode.
